    S

    Sarah - Class in RestaurantGame

    Constructor that creates a Sarah customer with predefined attributes.

    score - Variable in class RestaurantGame.Player

    selectedTicket - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Sets selected Ticket integer to 0
    Serve(int, Ticket) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Serves burger to customer ticketInt with given ticket.
    serveBurger(int, Ticket) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
    serve the order to the customer
    setState(Patty.CookingState) - Method in class RestaurantGame.Patty
    Sets the Patty's cooking state.
    setUpDay() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
    Calls setUpDay() on model
    setUpDay() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Resets day variables and makes new Customers and Ingredients for next day.

    shapes - Variable in class RestaurantGame.GenericCustomer
     
    size - Variable in class RestaurantGame.Basket
     
    size - Variable in class RestaurantGame.Oven
     
    start(Stage) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Sets up the starting page for the GUI.
    startCooking() - Method in class RestaurantGame.CookableToppings
    Starts the cooking timer for this topping.
    startCountdown(double) - Method in class RestaurantGame.Countdown
    Starts a countdown from the given number of seconds.
    startOvenTimer() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes a Timeline object that every second, updates the oven's GUI to show the Pattys as more cooked
    startPatienceTimer(int, int, Customer, int) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes a timer based on day and the customer('s patience level) to track how impatient the customer gets as their food is made.
    startStopwatch() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Countdown
    Starts the stopwatch timer, counting upward from zero.
    startTimer(double) - Method in interface RestaurantGame.Customer
    Starts the customer's countdown timer.
    startTimer(double) - Method in class RestaurantGame.GenericCustomer
    Starts the patience countdown timer for this customer.
    startTimer(double) - Method in class RestaurantGame.KnownCustomer
    Starts the customer's patience countdown.
    stateImage - Variable in class RestaurantGame.Patty
     
    stopCooking() - Method in class RestaurantGame.CookableToppings
    Stops the cooking timer.
    stopCountDown() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Ticket
    Stops the stopwatch and returns the total elapsed time.
    stopTimer() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Countdown
    Stops whichever timer (countdown or stopwatch) is currently running.
    stopTimer() - Method in interface RestaurantGame.Customer
    Stops the customer's countdown timer.
    stopTimer() - Method in class RestaurantGame.GenericCustomer
    Stops the customer's countdown timer.
    stopTimer() - Method in class RestaurantGame.KnownCustomer
    Stops the customer's patience countdown.
